About Elaina

An Integrated
Point of View

While I have maintained a successful real estate career since 2008, my technical expertise is anchored by over twenty years in corporate and in-house oil and gas law. Specializing in mineral ownership, severed estates, and complex title mechanics gave me a rare command over property assets that far exceeds standard industry boundaries.

Running parallel to this analytical foundation is a three-decade practice in photography, interior staging, and landscape design. I don't separate these modes; I integrate them — allowing me to analyze an asset from the ground up and execute the comprehensive curation needed to realize its full potential.

Four Disciplines. One Vision.

The Foundation of Property Mastery

I
A Deeper Approach to Property

Two decades of oil and gas law built a level of legal and structural scrutiny that traditional brokerages cannot replicate. Every transaction is rooted in deep asset literacy and protected value.

II
Spatial Curation & Strategic Staging

Interior design and staging treated as visual architecture. Market psychology meets sharp composition to transform physical spaces into compelling narratives that command attention and elevate worth.

III
The Living Canvas: Landscape

Design does not stop at the threshold of the door. The natural environment is an integral extension of the architectural structure — a living canvas that frames and anchors every property.

IV
Perception & Light: Behind the Lens

Nearly thirty years of photography trained the eye to understand light, shadow, geometry, and emotion — the creative engine powering all of this work and capturing the unique soul of every environment.

"Integrating twenty years of property law with three decades of aesthetic curation to realize a property's full potential."
Elaina Price · Property Visionary

Advisory

Legal Precision.
Structural Mastery.
Unparalleled Insight.

True insight into property demands more than transactional knowledge — it requires a mastery of both underlying structure and total environmental vision.

While a standard real estate transaction looks at the surface, my professional foundation is built from the bedrock up. For over twenty years, I operated within corporate and in-house oil and gas legal departments — specializing in mineral ownership, severed estates, and complex title mechanics.

I developed a rare and commanding mastery over property assets that far exceeds standard industry boundaries.

Deep Expertise in Complex Land Assets
  • Title
    Title Mechanics & Analytics

    Navigating and untangling complex title histories to ensure absolute transactional security. In the world of high-value real estate, what you cannot see matters just as much as what you can.

  • Estates
    Severed Estates & Rights

    Evaluating properties with split surface and mineral ownership to uncover hidden liabilities or latent value — a discipline honed over two decades of oil and gas legal practice.

  • Risk
    Asset De-Risking

    Applying rigorous corporate legal discipline to analyze property investments from the ground up, protecting your equity before you ever reach the closing table.

"In property acquisition, standard knowledge is a liability. True mastery is an asset. Whether analyzing a complex land tract or securing a premium estate, I bring decades of legal precision to ensure your real estate decisions are rooted in absolute certainty."

Curation

Spatial Vision.
Environmental Design.
The Art of the Horizon.

The Philosophy

A Property's True Potential Is Realized Through How It Is Experienced

Beyond the legal boundaries and structural mechanics lies the art of space — the alignment of light, composition, and environment. For over thirty years, I have practiced at the intersection of visual design and natural landscapes.

I do not view these creative disciplines as separate hobbies; I integrate them. They allow me to look at an asset and execute the comprehensive curation needed to maximize its aesthetic and emotional worth.

The Visual Disciplines

Landscape & Environmental Vision

Understanding the scale, character, and orientation of land. My deep connection to the horizon informs how a property sits within its environment — from the desert floor to the Rocky Mountain ridge.

Interior Staging & Styling

Translating structural spaces into compelling, high-end narratives that resonate visually and emotionally with prospective buyers. Visual architecture, not mere decoration.

The Photographic Eye

Capturing the distinct soul of an environment through light and perspective — a skill honed through decades behind the lens. Photography is the medium through which I practice the art of seeing. View the full photography portfolio →

Captured Perspectives

Visual storytelling is foundational to how I see property. My landscape photography practice is a lifelong exercise in studying the earth, analyzing light, and understanding space from the bedrock to the horizon.

Visual storytelling is foundational to how I see property. Below is a glimpse into my visual portfolio. To explore the full body of photographic work, visit the complete collection.
